src/components/SalesReports.tsx:import React from 'react';
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:import { SalesOrder, ProductionJob, Showroom, LostSale } from '../types';
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:interface SalesReportsProps {
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:  salesOrders: SalesOrder[];
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:  productionJobs: ProductionJob[];
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:  showrooms: Showroom[];
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:  lostSales: LostSale[];
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:}
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:export function SalesReports({ salesOrders, productionJobs, showrooms, lostSales }: SalesReportsProps) {
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:  // 1. تقرير دخل المعارض
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:  const showroomIncome = showrooms.map(showroom => {
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:    const orders = salesOrders.filter(o => o.showroomId === showroom.id);
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:    const totalProfit = orders.reduce((sum, o) => sum + o.netProfit, 0);
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:    return { name: showroom.name, profit: totalProfit };
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:  });
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:  // 2. تحليل ربحية الموديلات
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:  const modelProfitability = productionJobs.map(job => {
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:    const relatedSalesOrders = salesOrders.filter(so => so.items.some(item => item.jobId === job.id));
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:    const totalRevenue = relatedSalesOrders.reduce((sum, so) => {
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:      const orderItem = so.items.find(item => item.jobId === job.id);
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:      return sum + (orderItem?.sellingPrice || 0);
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:    }, 0);
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:    const totalCosts = (job.totalMaterialCost || 0) + (job.totalLaborCost || 0) + (job.totalOtherCost || 0);
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:    const netProfit = totalRevenue - totalCosts;
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:    return { name: job.productName, netProfit };
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:  });
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:  return (
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:    <div className="space-y-6">
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:      <Card>
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:        <CardHeader><CardTitle>الذكاء المالي: تقارير الأداء</CardTitle></CardHeader>
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:        <CardContent className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:            <div>
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:                <h3 className="font-bold mb-4">قائمة الدخل لكل معرض</h3>
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:                {showroomIncome.map(s => (
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:                    <div key={s.name} className="flex justify-between py-2 border-b">
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:                        <span>{s.name}</span>
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:                        <span className="font-black text-emerald-600">{s.profit.toLocaleString()}</span>
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:                    </div>
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:                ))}
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:            </div>
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:            <div>
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:                <h3 className="font-bold mb-4">ربحية الموديلات</h3>
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:                {modelProfitability.map(m => (
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:                    <div key={m.name} className="flex justify-between py-2 border-b">
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:                        <span>{m.name}</span>
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:                        <span className={`font-black ${m.netProfit >= 0 ? 'text-emerald-600' : 'text-red-600'}`}>
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:                            {m.netProfit.toLocaleString()}
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:                        </span>
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:                    </div>
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:                ))}
src/components/SalesReports.tsx:            </div>

src/AuthContext.tsx:import React, { createContext, useContext, useEffect, useState } from 'react';
src/AuthContext.tsx:import { onAuthStateChanged, User } from 'firebase/auth';
src/AuthContext.tsx:import { auth, db } from './firebase';
src/AuthContext.tsx:import { doc, getDoc, setDoc, onSnapshot } from 'firebase/firestore';
src/AuthContext.tsx:
src/AuthContext.tsx:export interface UserProfile {
src/AuthContext.tsx:  uid: string;
src/AuthContext.tsx:  email: string;
src/AuthContext.tsx:  name: string;
src/AuthContext.tsx:  isAdmin: boolean;
src/AuthContext.tsx:  permissions: {
src/AuthContext.tsx:    dashboard: boolean;
src/AuthContext.tsx:    inventory: boolean;
src/AuthContext.tsx:    production: boolean;
src/AuthContext.tsx:    maintenance: boolean;
src/AuthContext.tsx:    purchases: boolean;
src/AuthContext.tsx:    hr: boolean;
src/AuthContext.tsx:    reports: boolean;
src/AuthContext.tsx:    suppliers: boolean;
src/AuthContext.tsx:    settings: boolean;
src/AuthContext.tsx:    finance: boolean;
src/AuthContext.tsx:    sales: boolean;
src/AuthContext.tsx:    canDelete: boolean;
src/AuthContext.tsx:  };
src/AuthContext.tsx:}
src/AuthContext.tsx:
src/AuthContext.tsx:interface AuthContextType {
src/AuthContext.tsx:  user: User | null;
src/AuthContext.tsx:  profile: UserProfile | null;
src/AuthContext.tsx:  loading: boolean;
src/AuthContext.tsx:}
src/AuthContext.tsx:
src/AuthContext.tsx:const AuthContext = createContext<AuthContextType>({ user: null, profile: null, loading: true });
src/AuthContext.tsx:
src/AuthContext.tsx:export const AuthProvider: React.FC<{ children: React.ReactNode }> = ({ children }) => {
src/AuthContext.tsx:  const [user, setUser] = useState<User | null>(null);
src/AuthContext.tsx:  const [profile, setProfile] = useState<UserProfile | null>(null);
src/AuthContext.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
src/AuthContext.tsx:
src/AuthContext.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/AuthContext.tsx:    const unsubscribeAuth = onAuthStateChanged(auth, async (firebaseUser) => {
src/AuthContext.tsx:      setUser(firebaseUser);
src/AuthContext.tsx:      
src/AuthContext.tsx:      if (firebaseUser) {
src/AuthContext.tsx:        // Fetch profile
src/AuthContext.tsx:        try {
src/AuthContext.tsx:          const userDocRef = doc(db, 'users', firebaseUser.uid);
src/AuthContext.tsx:          
src/AuthContext.tsx:          // Use onSnapshot to keep profile in sync
src/AuthContext.tsx:          const unsubscribeProfile = onSnapshot(userDocRef, (docSnap) => {
src/AuthContext.tsx:            const masterAdminEmail = "cfo.moaz@gmail.com";
src/AuthContext.tsx:            const isMasterAdmin = firebaseUser.email === masterAdminEmail;
src/AuthContext.tsx:
src/AuthContext.tsx:            if (docSnap.exists()) {
src/AuthContext.tsx:              const data = docSnap.data() as UserProfile;
src/AuthContext.tsx:              
src/AuthContext.tsx:              // If it's the master admin but doesn't have admin flag, update it
src/AuthContext.tsx:              if (isMasterAdmin && !data.isAdmin) {
src/AuthContext.tsx:                const updatedProfile = {
src/AuthContext.tsx:                  ...data,
src/AuthContext.tsx:                  isAdmin: true,
src/AuthContext.tsx:                  permissions: Object.keys(data.permissions).reduce((acc, key) => ({
src/AuthContext.tsx:                    ...acc,
src/AuthContext.tsx:                    [key]: true
src/AuthContext.tsx:                  }), {} as UserProfile['permissions'])
src/AuthContext.tsx:                };
src/AuthContext.tsx:                setDoc(userDocRef, updatedProfile);
src/AuthContext.tsx:                setProfile(updatedProfile);
src/AuthContext.tsx:              } else {
src/AuthContext.tsx:                setProfile(data);
src/AuthContext.tsx:              }
src/AuthContext.tsx:            } else {
src/AuthContext.tsx:              // Check if this is the master admin email
src/AuthContext.tsx:              const isMasterAdmin = firebaseUser.email === masterAdminEmail;
src/AuthContext.tsx:
src/AuthContext.tsx:              // Create default profile for first time user
src/AuthContext.tsx:              const defaultProfile: UserProfile = {
src/AuthContext.tsx:                uid: firebaseUser.uid,
src/AuthContext.tsx:                email: firebaseUser.email || '',
src/AuthContext.tsx:                name: firebaseUser.displayName || 'مستخدم جديد',
src/AuthContext.tsx:                permissions: {
src/AuthContext.tsx:                  dashboard: true,
src/AuthContext.tsx:                  inventory: isMasterAdmin,
src/AuthContext.tsx:                  production: isMasterAdmin,
src/AuthContext.tsx:                  maintenance: isMasterAdmin,
src/AuthContext.tsx:                  purchases: isMasterAdmin,
src/AuthContext.tsx:                  hr: isMasterAdmin,
src/AuthContext.tsx:                  reports: isMasterAdmin,
src/AuthContext.tsx:                  suppliers: isMasterAdmin,
src/AuthContext.tsx:                  settings: isMasterAdmin,
src/AuthContext.tsx:                  finance: isMasterAdmin,
src/AuthContext.tsx:                  sales: isMasterAdmin,
src/AuthContext.tsx:                  canDelete: isMasterAdmin
src/AuthContext.tsx:                }
src/AuthContext.tsx:              };
src/AuthContext.tsx:              setDoc(userDocRef, defaultProfile);
src/AuthContext.tsx:              setProfile(defaultProfile);
src/AuthContext.tsx:            }
src/AuthContext.tsx:            setLoading(false);
src/AuthContext.tsx:          });
src/AuthContext.tsx:
src/AuthContext.tsx:          return () => {
src/AuthContext.tsx:            unsubscribeProfile();
src/AuthContext.tsx:          };
src/AuthContext.tsx:        } catch (error) {
src/AuthContext.tsx:          console.error("Profile fetch error:", error);
src/AuthContext.tsx:          setLoading(false);
src/AuthContext.tsx:        }
src/AuthContext.tsx:      } else {
src/AuthContext.tsx:        setProfile(null);
src/AuthContext.tsx:        setLoading(false);
src/AuthContext.tsx:      }
src/AuthContext.tsx:    });
src/AuthContext.tsx:
src/AuthContext.tsx:    return () => unsubscribeAuth();
src/AuthContext.tsx:  }, []);
src/AuthContext.tsx:
src/AuthContext.tsx:  return (
src/AuthContext.tsx:    <AuthContext.Provider value={{ user, profile, loading }}>
src/AuthContext.tsx:      {!loading && children}
src/AuthContext.tsx:    </AuthContext.Provider>
src/AuthContext.tsx:  );
src/AuthContext.tsx:};
src/AuthContext.tsx:
src/AuthContext.tsx:export const useAuth = () => useContext(AuthContext);

src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:// --- Calculations ---
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:const calculateLivePayroll = (
src/App.tsx:  p: Payroll, 
src/App.tsx:  employees: Employee[], 
src/App.tsx:  attendance: Attendance[], 
src/App.tsx:  transactions: FinancialTransaction[], 
src/App.tsx:  loans: Loan[], 
src/App.tsx:  productionRecords: ProductionRecord[]
src/App.tsx:) => {
src/App.tsx:  if (p.status !== 'مسودة') return p;
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  const emp = employees.find(e => e.id === p.employeeId);
src/App.tsx:  if (!emp) return p;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const empAttendance = attendance.filter(a => {
src/App.tsx:    if (a.employeeId !== emp.id || (a.status !== 'حضور' && a.status !== 'تأخير')) return false;
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const attendanceStats = empAttendance.reduce((acc, a) => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!a.checkIn || !a.checkOut) {
src/App.tsx:      acc.daysWorked += 1;
src/App.tsx:      return acc;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    const [inH, inM] = a.checkIn.split(':').map(Number);
src/App.tsx:    const [outH, outM] = a.checkOut.split(':').map(Number);
src/App.tsx:    const checkInMins = inH * 60 + inM;
src/App.tsx:    const checkOutMins = outH * 60 + outM;
src/App.tsx:    const shiftStartStr = emp.shiftStart || '08:00';
src/App.tsx:    const shiftEndStr = emp.shiftEnd || '18:00';
src/App.tsx:    const [sH, sM] = shiftStartStr.split(':').map(Number);
src/App.tsx:    const [eH, eM] = shiftEndStr.split(':').map(Number);
src/App.tsx:    const officialStart = sH * 60 + sM;
src/App.tsx:    const officialEnd = eH * 60 + eM;
src/App.tsx:    const shiftDurationMins = officialEnd - officialStart;
src/App.tsx:    const gracePeriod = 15;
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    if (checkInMins <= officialStart + gracePeriod && a.checkOut === '12:00' && officialStart <= 12 * 60) {
src/App.tsx:      acc.daysWorked += 0.5;
src/App.tsx:      return acc;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    let lateMins = 0;
src/App.tsx:    if (checkInMins > officialStart + gracePeriod) lateMins = checkInMins - officialStart;
src/App.tsx:    const earlyMins = Math.max(0, officialEnd - checkOutMins);
src/App.tsx:    acc.daysWorked += 1;
src/App.tsx:    acc.timeDeduction += (lateMins + earlyMins) * (emp.dailyRate / (shiftDurationMins > 0 ? shiftDurationMins : 600));
src/App.tsx:    return acc;
src/App.tsx:  }, { daysWorked: 0, timeDeduction: 0 });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const totalOvertime = empTransactions.filter(t => t.type === 'إضافي' || t.type === 'أوفرتايم').reduce((sum, t) => sum + (Number(t.amount) || 0), 0);
src/App.tsx:  const totalBonuses = empTransactions.filter(t => t.type === 'مكافأة' || t.type === 'مكافآت' || t.type === 'بدل').reduce((sum, t) => sum + (Number(t.amount) || 0), 0);
src/App.tsx:  const totalExpenses = empTransactions.filter(t => t.type === 'مصروف' || t.type === 'سلفة' || t.type === 'عهدة').reduce((sum, t) => sum + (Number(t.amount) || 0), 0);
src/App.tsx:  const manualLoanDeductions = empTransactions.filter(t => t.type === 'خصم سلف' || t.type === 'سلفة مستردة').reduce((sum, t) => sum + (Number(t.amount) || 0), 0);
src/App.tsx:  const manualDeductions = empTransactions.filter(t => t.type === 'خصم' || t.type === 'جزاء').reduce((sum, t) => sum + (Number(t.amount) || 0), 0);
src/App.tsx:  const totalDeductions = manualDeductions + Math.round(attendanceStats.timeDeduction * 100) / 100;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const totalProduction = empProduction.reduce((sum, r) => sum + r.total, 0);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  let baseSalary = 0;
src/App.tsx:  if (emp.payMethod === 'production') {
src/App.tsx:    baseSalary = totalProduction;
src/App.tsx:  } else {
src/App.tsx:    baseSalary = emp.dailyRate * attendanceStats.daysWorked;
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const earningsBeforeLoans = baseSalary + totalBonuses + totalOvertime - totalDeductions - totalExpenses + (emp.payMethod === 'daily' ? totalProduction : 0);
src/App.tsx:  const availableForLoans = Math.max(0, earningsBeforeLoans);
src/App.tsx:  const empLoans = loans.filter(l => l.employeeId === emp.id && l.status === 'نشط');
src/App.tsx:  const calculatedLoans = empLoans.reduce((sum, l) => {
src/App.tsx:    const weeklyInstallment = l.installments && l.installments > 0 ? l.amount / l.installments : (emp.dailyRate * (attendanceStats.daysWorked || 6)) * 0.1;
src/App.tsx:    return sum + Math.min(l.remainingAmount, weeklyInstallment);
src/App.tsx:  }, 0) + manualLoanDeductions;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const totalLoans = Math.min(calculatedLoans, availableForLoans);
src/App.tsx:  const netSalary = Math.max(0, earningsBeforeLoans - totalLoans);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return { ...p, daysWorked: attendanceStats.daysWorked, baseSalary, totalBonuses, totalOvertime, totalProduction, totalDeductions, totalExpenses, totalLoans, netSalary };
src/App.tsx:};
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:  const [includeDrafts, setIncludeDrafts] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:  const [reportSearch, setReportSearch] = useState('');
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const filteredPayrolls = payrolls.filter(p => {
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    if (includeDrafts) {
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  }).map(p => calculateLivePayroll(p, employees, attendance, hrTransactions, loans, productionRecords));
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  const totalWages = filteredPayrolls.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.netSalary, 0);
src/App.tsx:  const totalBonuses = filteredPayrolls.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.totalBonuses || 0), 0);
src/App.tsx:  const totalOvertime = filteredPayrolls.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.totalOvertime || 0), 0);
src/App.tsx:  const totalDeductions = filteredPayrolls.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.totalDeductions || 0), 0);
src/App.tsx:  const totalExpenses = filteredPayrolls.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.totalExpenses || 0), 0);
src/App.tsx:  const totalLoansRecovered = filteredPayrolls.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.totalLoans || 0), 0);
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  const avgNetSalary = paidEmployeeCount > 0 ? totalWages / paidEmployeeCount : 0;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const deptData = employees.reduce((acc: any[], emp) => {
src/App.tsx:    const dept = emp.department || 'غير محدد';
src/App.tsx:    const deptPayrolls = filteredPayrolls.filter(p => p.employeeId === emp.id);
src/App.tsx:    const amount = deptPayrolls.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.netSalary, 0);
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    if (amount > 0) {
src/App.tsx:      const existing = acc.find(a => a.name === dept);

src/App.tsx:      } else {
src/App.tsx:        acc.push({ name: dept, value: amount });
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    return acc;
src/App.tsx:  }, []);

src/App.tsx:                      {p.totalProduction > 0 ? `+${p.totalProduction.toLocaleString()}` : '0'}
src/App.tsx:                    </TableCell>
src/App.tsx:                    <TableCell>
src/App.tsx:                      <div className="flex flex-col">
src/App.tsx:                        <span className="font-black text-green-600">+{ (p.totalBonuses || 0).toLocaleString() }</span>
src/App.tsx:                           <span key={i} className="text-[8px] text-green-400 font-bold truncate max-w-[80px]" title={t.description}>{t.description}</span>
src/App.tsx:                        ))}
src/App.tsx:                      </div>
src/App.tsx:                    </TableCell>
src/App.tsx:                    <TableCell>
src/App.tsx:                      <div className="flex flex-col">
src/App.tsx:                        <span className="font-black text-blue-600">+{ (p.totalOvertime || 0).toLocaleString() }</span>
src/App.tsx:                           <span key={i} className="text-[8px] text-blue-400 font-bold truncate max-w-[80px]" title={t.description}>{t.description}</span>
src/App.tsx:                        ))}
src/App.tsx:                      </div>
src/App.tsx:                    </TableCell>
src/App.tsx:                    <TableCell className="font-black text-red-600">
src/App.tsx:                      -{( (p.totalDeductions || 0) + (p.totalLoans || 0) ).toLocaleString()}
src/App.tsx:                    </TableCell>
src/App.tsx:                    <TableCell className="font-black text-primary text-lg">
src/App.tsx:                      {p.netSalary.toLocaleString()} <span className="text-xs">ج.م</span>
src/App.tsx:                    </TableCell>
src/App.tsx:                  </TableRow>
src/App.tsx:                );
src/App.tsx:              })}
src/App.tsx:              {tableData.length === 0 && (
src/App.tsx:                <TableRow>
src/App.tsx:                  <TableCell colSpan={6} className="text-center py-24">
src/App.tsx:                    <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4 opacity-30">
src/App.tsx:                      <BarChart3 size={64} />
src/App.tsx:                      <p className="font-black text-2xl">لا توجد سجلات مطابقة</p>
src/App.tsx:                    </div>
src/App.tsx:                  </TableCell>
src/App.tsx:                </TableRow>
src/App.tsx:              )}
src/App.tsx:            </TableBody>
src/App.tsx:          </Table>
src/App.tsx:        </CardContent>
src/App.tsx:      </Card>
src/App.tsx:    </div>
src/App.tsx:  );
src/App.tsx:}

src/App.tsx:  const getItemMovements = (itemId: string) => {
src/App.tsx:    const item = items.find(i => i.id === itemId);
src/App.tsx:    if (!item) return [];
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const movements: any[] = [];
src/App.tsx:    movements.push({
src/App.tsx:      date: '---',
src/App.tsx:      type: 'رصيد أول المدة',
src/App.tsx:      in: item.openingBalance,
src/App.tsx:      out: 0,
src/App.tsx:      balance: item.openingBalance,
src/App.tsx:      notes: 'الرصيد الافتتاحي عند التأسيس'
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    purchases.filter(p => p.itemId === itemId).forEach(p => {
src/App.tsx:      movements.push({
src/App.tsx:        date: p.date,
src/App.tsx:        type: 'شراء (وارد)',
src/App.tsx:        in: p.quantity,
src/App.tsx:        out: 0,
src/App.tsx:        notes: `مورد: ${suppliers.find(s => s.id === p.supplierId)?.name || 'غير معروف'}`
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    issuances.filter(iss => iss.itemId === itemId).forEach(iss => {
src/App.tsx:      const isReturn = iss.jobOrderNo === 'RETURN';
src/App.tsx:      const isReturnFromCostCenter = iss.costCenter.startsWith('مرتجع من:');
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      if (isReturn) {
src/App.tsx:        if (isReturnFromCostCenter) {
src/App.tsx:          movements.push({
src/App.tsx:            date: iss.date,
src/App.tsx:            type: 'مرتجع (وارد)',
src/App.tsx:            in: iss.quantity,
src/App.tsx:            out: 0,
src/App.tsx:            notes: iss.costCenter
src/App.tsx:          });
src/App.tsx:        } else {
src/App.tsx:          movements.push({
src/App.tsx:            date: iss.date,
src/App.tsx:            type: 'مرتجع (منصرف)',
src/App.tsx:            in: 0,
src/App.tsx:            out: iss.quantity,
src/App.tsx:            notes: iss.costCenter
src/App.tsx:          });
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      } else {
src/App.tsx:        movements.push({
src/App.tsx:          date: iss.date,
src/App.tsx:          type: 'صرف (منصرف)',
src/App.tsx:          in: 0,
src/App.tsx:          out: iss.quantity,
src/App.tsx:          notes: `أمر تشغيل: ${iss.jobOrderNo} | ${iss.costCenter}`
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    wasteRecords.filter(w => w.itemId === itemId).forEach(w => {
src/App.tsx:      movements.push({
src/App.tsx:        date: w.date,
src/App.tsx:        type: 'هالك (منصرف)',
src/App.tsx:        in: 0,
src/App.tsx:        out: w.quantity,
src/App.tsx:        notes: `سبب الهالك: ${w.reason} | ${w.notes}`
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const sorted = movements.sort((a, b) => {
src/App.tsx:      if (a.date === '---') return -1;
src/App.tsx:      if (b.date === '---') return 1;
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:    return sorted;
src/App.tsx:  };

src/App.tsx:  const lowStockItems = items.filter(item => item.currentBalance <= item.safetyLimit);

src/App.tsx:    return acc + (w.quantity * (item?.price || 0));
src/App.tsx:  }, 0);

src/App.tsx:  const totalManufacturingCost = productionJobs.reduce((acc, job) => {

src/App.tsx:    const otherCost = jobOtherCosts.filter(o => o.jobId === job.id).reduce((sum, o) => sum + o.amount, 0);
src/App.tsx:    return acc + materialCost + laborCost + otherCost;
src/App.tsx:  }, 0);

src/App.tsx:                          )}
src/App.tsx:                        </TableBody>

src/App.tsx:                        <span className="text-slate-900 font-black">{(issuances.filter(i => i.jobOrderNo === viewingJob.orderNo).reduce((s, i) => s + i.total, 0)).toLocaleString()} ج.م</span>

src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  // 1. By Category
src/App.tsx:  const categoryData = Object.entries(
src/App.tsx:    expenses.reduce((acc, curr) => {
src/App.tsx:      const cat = curr.category || 'غير مصنف';
src/App.tsx:      acc[cat] = (acc[cat] || 0) + curr.amount;
src/App.tsx:      return acc;
src/App.tsx:    }, {} as Record<string, number>)
src/App.tsx:  ).map(([name, value]) => ({ name, value }))
src/App.tsx:   .sort((a, b) => b.value - a.value);
src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:      acc[ccName] = (acc[ccName] || 0) + curr.amount;
src/App.tsx:      return acc;
src/App.tsx:    }, {} as Record<string, number>)
src/App.tsx:  ).map(([name, value]) => ({ name, value }))

src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    try {

src/App.tsx:      });

src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:      }

src/App.tsx:          itemId: selectedItem.itemId,
src/App.tsx:          quantity: selectedItem.quantity,
src/App.tsx:          unitPrice: selectedItem.unitPrice,
src/App.tsx:          total: itemTotal,
src/App.tsx:          paidAmount: formData.paidAmount > 0 ? (formData.paidAmount * (itemTotal / invoiceTotal)) : 0, 
src/App.tsx:          paymentStatus: formData.paymentStatus,
src/App.tsx:          notes: formData.notes,
src/App.tsx:          date,
src/App.tsx:          unit: item?.unit || '',
src/App.tsx:          safeId: formData.safeId || null,
src/App.tsx:          safeTransactionId: safeTransactionId || null
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        // Update Item Stock
src/App.tsx:        const itemRef = doc(db, 'items', selectedItem.itemId);
src/App.tsx:        const currentTotalValue = (item?.totalValue || (item ? item.currentBalance * item.price : 0));
src/App.tsx:        const newTotalValue = currentTotalValue + itemTotal;
src/App.tsx:        const newQuantity = (item?.currentBalance || 0) + selectedItem.quantity;
src/App.tsx:        const newAveragePrice = newQuantity > 0 ? newTotalValue / newQuantity : selectedItem.unitPrice;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        batch.update(itemRef, {
src/App.tsx:          inward: increment(selectedItem.quantity),
src/App.tsx:          currentBalance: increment(selectedItem.quantity),
src/App.tsx:          totalValue: newTotalValue,
src/App.tsx:          price: newAveragePrice
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // Update Supplier Balance
src/App.tsx:      const supplierRef = doc(db, 'suppliers', formData.supplierId);
src/App.tsx:      const balanceChange = invoiceTotal - formData.paidAmount;
src/App.tsx:      batch.update(supplierRef, {
src/App.tsx:        totalPurchases: increment(invoiceTotal),
src/App.tsx:        totalPayments: increment(formData.paidAmount),
src/App.tsx:        balance: increment(balanceChange)
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      await batch.commit();
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      setShowAdd(false);
src/App.tsx:      setFormData({
src/App.tsx:        supplierId: '',
src/App.tsx:        selectedItems: [{ itemId: '', quantity: 0, unitPrice: 0 }],
src/App.tsx:        paidAmount: 0,
src/App.tsx:        paymentStatus: 'نقدي',
src/App.tsx:        safeId: '',

src/App.tsx:function Issuances({ items, issuances, costCenters }: { items: Item[], issuances: Issuance[], costCenters: CostCenter[] }) {

src/App.tsx:  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
src/App.tsx:  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
src/App.tsx:    jobOrderNo: '',
src/App.tsx:    costCenter: '',
src/App.tsx:    selectedItems: [{ itemId: '', quantity: 0 }]
src/App.tsx:  });

src/App.tsx:    if (costCenters.length > 0 && !formData.costCenter) {
src/App.tsx:      setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, costCenter: costCenters[0].name }));
src/App.tsx:    }

src/App.tsx:    const jobOrder = iss.jobOrderNo || '';
src/App.tsx:    const search = searchTerm.toLowerCase();
src/App.tsx:    const matchesSearch = item.toLowerCase().includes(search) || 
src/App.tsx:           costCenter.toLowerCase().includes(search) || 
src/App.tsx:           jobOrder.toLowerCase().includes(search);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    return matchesSearch && matchesStart && matchesEnd;
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleExportExcel = () => {
src/App.tsx:    const data = filteredIssuances.map(iss => ({
src/App.tsx:      'رقم أمر الشغل': iss.jobOrderNo,
src/App.tsx:      'الصنف': items.find(i => i.id === iss.itemId)?.name || 'غير معروف',
src/App.tsx:      'الكمية': iss.quantity,
src/App.tsx:      'الوحدة': iss.unit,
src/App.tsx:      'مركز التكلفة': iss.costCenter,
src/App.tsx:      'الإجمالي': iss.total
src/App.tsx:    }));
src/App.tsx:    const ws = XLSX.utils.json_to_sheet(data);

src/App.tsx:function Suppliers({
src/App.tsx:  suppliers,
src/App.tsx:  purchases,
src/App.tsx:  items,
src/App.tsx:  supplierPayments,
src/App.tsx:  safes,
src/App.tsx:  profile,
src/App.tsx:  setEditingSupplier,
src/App.tsx:  setShowDeleteConfirm
src/App.tsx:}: { 
src/App.tsx:  suppliers: Supplier[], 
src/App.tsx:  purchases: Purchase[], 
src/App.tsx:  items: Item[], 
src/App.tsx:  supplierPayments: SupplierPayment[],
src/App.tsx:  safes: Safe[],
src/App.tsx:  profile: any,
src/App.tsx:  setEditingSupplier: (s: Supplier) => void,
src/App.tsx:  setShowDeleteConfirm: (info: { collection: string, id: string }) => void
src/App.tsx:}) {
src/App.tsx:  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
src/App.tsx:  const [selectedSupplier, setSelectedSupplier] = useState<Supplier | null>(null);
src/App.tsx:  const [showPaymentModal, setShowPaymentModal] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:  const [paymentSupplierId, setPaymentSupplierId] = useState<string | null>(null);
src/App.tsx:  const [paymentData, setPaymentData] = useState({
src/App.tsx:    amount: 0,
src/App.tsx:    paymentMethod: 'نقدي' as const,
src/App.tsx:    referenceNumber: '',
src/App.tsx:    safeId: '',
src/App.tsx:    notes: ''
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleAddPayment = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!paymentSupplierId || paymentData.amount <= 0) return;
src/App.tsx:    if (paymentData.amount > 0 && !paymentData.safeId) {
src/App.tsx:      alert('يرجى اختيار الخزنة التي سيتم صرف المبلغ منها');
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    const supplier = suppliers.find(s => s.id === paymentSupplierId);
src/App.tsx:    if (!supplier) return;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const batch = writeBatch(db);
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const paymentRef = doc(collection(db, 'supplierPayments'));
src/App.tsx:      batch.set(paymentRef, {
src/App.tsx:        supplierId: paymentSupplierId,
src/App.tsx:        date: paymentData.date,
src/App.tsx:        amount: paymentData.amount,
src/App.tsx:        paymentMethod: paymentData.paymentMethod,
src/App.tsx:        referenceNumber: paymentData.referenceNumber,
src/App.tsx:        notes: paymentData.notes,
src/App.tsx:        safeId: paymentData.safeId || null
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      if (paymentData.safeId) {
src/App.tsx:        const txRef = doc(collection(db, 'safeTransactions'));
src/App.tsx:        batch.set(txRef, {
src/App.tsx:          safeId: paymentData.safeId,
src/App.tsx:          date: paymentData.date,
src/App.tsx:          type: 'مصروفات',
src/App.tsx:          amount: paymentData.amount,
src/App.tsx:          description: `سداد دفعة للمورد: ${supplier.name} ${paymentData.notes ? `- ${paymentData.notes}` : ''}`,
src/App.tsx:          category: 'سداد موردين',
src/App.tsx:          relatedId: paymentRef.id,
src/App.tsx:          createdBy: profile?.name || 'مستخدم'
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:function StockAuditView({ items, warehouses, audits }: { items: Item[], warehouses: Warehouse[], audits: StockAudit[] }) {

src/App.tsx:  const [isAuditing, setIsAuditing] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:  const [showHistory, setShowHistory] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const warehouseItems = items.filter(i => i.warehouseId === selectedWarehouseId);
src/App.tsx:  const filteredItems = warehouseItems.filter(i => i.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()));
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const startAudit = () => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!selectedWarehouseId) {
src/App.tsx:      alert('الرجاء اختيار المخزن أولاً');
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    const initialData: {[key: string]: number} = {};
src/App.tsx:    warehouseItems.forEach(item => {
src/App.tsx:      initialData[item.id] = item.currentBalance;
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:    setAuditData(initialData);
src/App.tsx:    setIsAuditing(true);
src/App.tsx:    setShowHistory(false);
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleAuditChange = (itemId: string, value: string) => {
src/App.tsx:    setAuditData(prev => ({
src/App.tsx:      ...prev,
src/App.tsx:      [itemId]: parseFloat(value) || 0
src/App.tsx:    }));
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const submitAudit = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const audit: Omit<StockAudit, 'id'> = {
src/App.tsx:        warehouseId: selectedWarehouseId,
src/App.tsx:        auditItems: warehouseItems.map(item => ({
src/App.tsx:          itemId: item.id,
src/App.tsx:          itemName: item.name,
src/App.tsx:          systemStock: item.currentBalance,
src/App.tsx:          actualStock: auditData[item.id] ?? item.currentBalance,
src/App.tsx:          difference: (auditData[item.id] ?? item.currentBalance) - item.currentBalance
src/App.tsx:        })),
src/App.tsx:        notes,
src/App.tsx:        createdBy: auth.currentUser?.email || 'Unknown'
src/App.tsx:      };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      await addDoc(collection(db, 'stockAudits'), { ...audit, createdAt: serverTimestamp() });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // Update item stocks and create issuances for adjustments
src/App.tsx:      for (const entry of audit.auditItems) {
src/App.tsx:        if (entry.difference !== 0) {
src/App.tsx:          const itemRef = doc(db, 'items', entry.itemId);
src/App.tsx:          const item = items.find(i => i.id === entry.itemId);
src/App.tsx:          if (item) {
src/App.tsx:             const newBalance = entry.actualStock;
src/App.tsx:             const update: Partial<Item> = {
src/App.tsx:               currentBalance: newBalance
src/App.tsx:             };
src/App.tsx:             
src/App.tsx:             if (entry.difference > 0) {
src/App.tsx:               update.returned = (item.returned || 0) + entry.difference;
src/App.tsx:             } else {
src/App.tsx:               update.outward = (item.outward || 0) + Math.abs(entry.difference);
src/App.tsx:             }
src/App.tsx:             
src/App.tsx:             // Update total value based on average price
src/App.tsx:             update.totalValue = entry.actualStock * (item.price || 0);
src/App.tsx:             
src/App.tsx:             await updateDoc(itemRef, update);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:             // Create an issuance record for the movement log
src/App.tsx:             await addDoc(collection(db, 'issuances'), {
src/App.tsx:                jobOrderNo: entry.difference > 0 ? 'RETURN' : 'AUDIT',
src/App.tsx:                itemId: entry.itemId,
src/App.tsx:                quantity: Math.abs(entry.difference),
src/App.tsx:                unit: item.unit,
src/App.tsx:                price: item.price,
src/App.tsx:                total: Math.abs(entry.difference) * item.price,
src/App.tsx:                costCenter: entry.difference > 0 ? `مرتجع من: زيادة جرد (${warehouses.find(w => w.id === selectedWarehouseId)?.name})` : `تسوية عجز جرد (${warehouses.find(w => w.id === selectedWarehouseId)?.name})`
src/App.tsx:             });
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      alert('تم تسجيل الجرد بنجاح');
src/App.tsx:      setIsAuditing(false);
src/App.tsx:      setAuditData({});
src/App.tsx:      setNotes('');
src/App.tsx:    } catch (err) {
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };

src/App.tsx:function Returns({ items, suppliers, costCenters }: { items: Item[], suppliers: Supplier[], costCenters: CostCenter[] }) {
src/App.tsx:  const [showAdd, setShowAdd] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:  const [returnType, setReturnType] = useState<'cost_center' | 'supplier'>('cost_center');
src/App.tsx:  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
src/App.tsx:    itemId: '',
src/App.tsx:    supplierId: '',
src/App.tsx:    quantity: 0,
src/App.tsx:    costCenter: '',
src/App.tsx:    notes: ''
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    if (costCenters.length > 0 && !formData.costCenter) {
src/App.tsx:      setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, costCenter: costCenters[0].name }));
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  }, [costCenters]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleAdd = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!formData.itemId || formData.quantity <= 0) return;
src/App.tsx:    if (returnType === 'supplier' && !formData.supplierId) return;
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const item = items.find(i => i.id === formData.itemId);
src/App.tsx:      if (!item) return;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      if (returnType === 'cost_center') {
src/App.tsx:        // Return from Cost Center to Inventory
src/App.tsx:        const currentAveragePrice = item.price || 0;
src/App.tsx:        await updateDoc(doc(db, 'items', formData.itemId), {
src/App.tsx:          returned: increment(formData.quantity),
src/App.tsx:          currentBalance: increment(formData.quantity),
src/App.tsx:          totalValue: increment(formData.quantity * currentAveragePrice)
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:      } else {
src/App.tsx:        // Return from Inventory to Supplier
src/App.tsx:        // 1. Update Inventory
src/App.tsx:        const currentAveragePrice = item.price || 0;
src/App.tsx:        await updateDoc(doc(db, 'items', formData.itemId), {
src/App.tsx:          outward: increment(formData.quantity),
src/App.tsx:          currentBalance: increment(-formData.quantity),
src/App.tsx:          totalValue: increment(-formData.quantity * currentAveragePrice)
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        // 2. Update Supplier Balance (Reduce debt)
src/App.tsx:        const refundValue = formData.quantity * currentAveragePrice;
src/App.tsx:        await updateDoc(doc(db, 'suppliers', formData.supplierId), {
src/App.tsx:          totalPurchases: increment(-refundValue),
src/App.tsx:          balance: increment(-refundValue)
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // Log the return transaction (optional, but good for history)
src/App.tsx:      await addDoc(collection(db, 'issuances'), {
src/App.tsx:        itemId: formData.itemId,
src/App.tsx:        quantity: formData.quantity,
src/App.tsx:        unit: item.unit,
src/App.tsx:        price: item.price,
src/App.tsx:        total: formData.quantity * item.price,
src/App.tsx:        costCenter: returnType === 'cost_center' ? `مرتجع من: ${formData.costCenter}` : `مرتجع إلى المورد: ${suppliers.find(s => s.id === formData.supplierId)?.name}`,
src/App.tsx:        jobOrderNo: 'RETURN'
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      setShowAdd(false);
src/App.tsx:      setFormData({ itemId: '', supplierId: '', quantity: 0, costCenter: costCenters[0]?.name || '', notes: '' });
src/App.tsx:    } catch (err) {
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <div className="space-y-12 animate-in fade-in duration-700">
src/App.tsx:      <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-8">
src/App.tsx:        <div>
src/App.tsx:          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-orange-600 font-black text-xs uppercase tracking-widest px-4 py-1.5 bg-orange-50 rounded-full w-fit mb-4">
src/App.tsx:            <RotateCcw size={14} />
src/App.tsx:            إدارة المرتجعات
src/App.tsx:          </div>

src/App.tsx:        >

src/App.tsx:        unit: item.unit,
src/App.tsx:        date
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // 2. Update Item Stock
src/App.tsx:      const currentAveragePrice = item.price || 0;
src/App.tsx:      const wasteValue = formData.quantity * currentAveragePrice;
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      await updateDoc(doc(db, 'items', formData.itemId), {
src/App.tsx:        wasted: increment(formData.quantity),
src/App.tsx:        currentBalance: increment(-formData.quantity),
src/App.tsx:        totalValue: increment(-wasteValue)
src/App.tsx:      });

src/App.tsx:      setFormData({ itemId: '', quantity: 0, reason: '', notes: '' });

src/App.tsx:                  </label>

src/App.tsx:                    value={formData.notes} 
src/App.tsx:                    onChange={e => setFormData({...formData, notes: e.target.value})}

src/App.tsx:                  />
src/App.tsx:                </div>
src/App.tsx:              </div>

src/App.tsx:                <Button onClick={handleAdd} className="h-16 px-12 rounded-2xl bg-rose-600 hover:bg-rose-700 text-white font-black text-lg shadow-2xl shadow-rose-600/30 transition-all hover:-translate-y-1">

src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:function ReportsView({ 
src/App.tsx:  items, 
src/App.tsx:  suppliers, 
src/App.tsx:  purchases, 
src/App.tsx:  issuances, 
src/App.tsx:  warehouses, 
src/App.tsx:  productionJobs, 
src/App.tsx:  jobLabors, 
src/App.tsx:  jobOtherCosts,
src/App.tsx:  wasteRecords,
src/App.tsx:  bladeSharpening,
src/App.tsx:  plateSharpening,
src/App.tsx:  machineMaintenance,
src/App.tsx:}: { 
src/App.tsx:  items: Item[], 
src/App.tsx:  suppliers: Supplier[], 
src/App.tsx:  purchases: Purchase[], 
src/App.tsx:  issuances: Issuance[], 
src/App.tsx:  warehouses: Warehouse[],
src/App.tsx:  productionJobs: ProductionJob[],
src/App.tsx:  jobLabors: JobLabor[],
src/App.tsx:  jobOtherCosts: JobOtherCost[],
src/App.tsx:  wasteRecords: Waste[],
src/App.tsx:  bladeSharpening: BladeSharpening[],
src/App.tsx:  plateSharpening: PlateSharpening[],
src/App.tsx:  machineMaintenance: MachineMaintenance[],
src/App.tsx:}) {
src/App.tsx:  const [activeReportTab, setActiveReportTab] = useState<'dashboard' | 'warehouse' | 'purchases' | 'suppliers'>('dashboard');
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Supplier Reports Data
src/App.tsx:  const supplierDebtData = suppliers
src/App.tsx:    .filter(s => s.balance > 0)
src/App.tsx:    .map(s => ({ name: s.name, balance: s.balance }))
src/App.tsx:    .sort((a, b) => b.balance - a.balance)
src/App.tsx:    .slice(0, 10);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const supplierPurchasesData = suppliers
src/App.tsx:    .map(s => ({ 
src/App.tsx:      name: s.name, 
src/App.tsx:      total: s.totalPurchases, 
src/App.tsx:      paid: s.totalPayments,
src/App.tsx:      debt: s.balance
src/App.tsx:    }))
src/App.tsx:    .sort((a, b) => b.total - a.total)
src/App.tsx:    .slice(0, 8);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const totalPaymentsAcrossSuppliers = suppliers.reduce((acc, s) => acc + s.totalPayments, 0);
src/App.tsx:  const totalDebtAcrossSuppliers = suppliers.reduce((acc, s) => acc + s.balance, 0);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Logic for Purchase Reports
src/App.tsx:  const purchasesBySupplier = suppliers.map(s => ({
src/App.tsx:    name: s.name,
src/App.tsx:    amount: purchases.filter(p => p.supplierId === s.id).reduce((acc, p) => acc + p.total, 0)
src/App.tsx:  })).filter(s => s.amount > 0).sort((a, b) => b.amount - a.amount);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const topPurchasedItems = issuances.reduce((acc: any[], iss) => {
src/App.tsx:    // Note: User might mean items with most purchases, but standard purchase reports
src/App.tsx:    // often look at what we are buying most.
src/App.tsx:    return acc;
src/App.tsx:  }, []);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Alternative for Top Items by Purchase Value
src/App.tsx:  const itemsByPurchaseValue = items.map(item => ({
src/App.tsx:    name: item.name,
src/App.tsx:    value: purchases.filter(p => p.itemId === item.id).reduce((acc, p) => acc + p.total, 0)
src/App.tsx:  })).filter(i => i.value > 0).sort((a, b) => b.value - a.value).slice(0, 7);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const purchaseTrends = Array.from({ length: 6 }).map((_, i) => {
src/App.tsx:    date.setMonth(date.getMonth() - i);
src/App.tsx:    const monthStr = format(date, 'MMM yyyy');
src/App.tsx:    const amount = purchases
src/App.tsx:      .reduce((acc, p) => acc + p.total, 0);
src/App.tsx:    return { name: monthStr, amount };
src/App.tsx:  }).reverse();
src/App.tsx:  const warehouseData = warehouses.map(w => {
src/App.tsx:    const value = items
src/App.tsx:      .filter(i => i.warehouseId === w.id)
src/App.tsx:      .reduce((acc, i) => acc + (i.currentBalance * i.price), 0);
src/App.tsx:    return { name: w.name, value };
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const totalInventoryValue = warehouseData.reduce((acc, w) => acc + w.value, 0);
src/App.tsx:  const totalSupplierDebt = suppliers.reduce((acc, s) => acc + s.balance, 0);
src/App.tsx:  const totalWasteValue = wasteRecords.reduce((acc, w) => {
src/App.tsx:    const item = items.find(i => i.id === w.itemId);
src/App.tsx:    return acc + (w.quantity * (item?.price || 0));
src/App.tsx:  }, 0);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // 2. Data for Cost Center Consumption
src/App.tsx:  const costCenterData = issuances.reduce((acc: any[], iss) => {
src/App.tsx:    const existing = acc.find(a => a.name === iss.costCenter);
src/App.tsx:    if (existing) {
src/App.tsx:      existing.value += iss.total;
src/App.tsx:    } else {
src/App.tsx:      acc.push({ name: iss.costCenter, value: iss.total });
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    return acc;
src/App.tsx:  }, []);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // 3. Production Profitability Data
src/App.tsx:  const productionProfitData = productionJobs.map(job => {
src/App.tsx:    const jobMaterials = issuances.filter(i => i.jobOrderNo === job.orderNo);
src/App.tsx:    const jobLaborsList = jobLabors.filter(l => l.jobId === job.id);
src/App.tsx:    const jobOtherCostsList = jobOtherCosts.filter(o => o.jobId === job.id);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const materialCost = jobMaterials.reduce((sum, m) => sum + m.total, 0);
src/App.tsx:    const laborCost = jobLaborsList.reduce((sum, l) => sum + l.total, 0);
src/App.tsx:    const otherCost = jobOtherCostsList.reduce((sum, o) => sum + o.amount, 0);
src/App.tsx:    const totalCost = materialCost + laborCost + otherCost;
src/App.tsx:    const profit = (job.sellingPrice || 0) - totalCost;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    return {
src/App.tsx:      name: job.productName,
src/App.tsx:      orderNo: job.orderNo,
src/App.tsx:      cost: totalCost,
src/App.tsx:      sellingPrice: job.sellingPrice || 0,
src/App.tsx:      profit: profit
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const totalProductionCost = productionProfitData.reduce((acc, j) => acc + j.cost, 0);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // 4. Monthly Trends (Last 6 months)
src/App.tsx:  const monthlyTrends = Array.from({ length: 6 }).map((_, i) => {
src/App.tsx:    date.setMonth(date.getMonth() - i);
src/App.tsx:    const monthStr = format(date, 'MMM yyyy');
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    const monthPurchases = purchases
src/App.tsx:      .reduce((acc, p) => acc + p.total, 0);
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:    const monthIssuances = issuances
src/App.tsx:      .reduce((acc, iss) => acc + iss.total, 0);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    return { name: monthStr, purchases: monthPurchases, issuances: monthIssuances };
src/App.tsx:  }).reverse();
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // 5. Maintenance Data

src/App.tsx:  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
src/App.tsx:  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
src/App.tsx:    name: '',
src/App.tsx:    position: '',
src/App.tsx:    department: '',
src/App.tsx:    dailyRate: 0,
src/App.tsx:    payMethod: 'daily' as 'daily' | 'production',
src/App.tsx:    pieceRate: 0,
src/App.tsx:    phone: '',
src/App.tsx:    status: 'نشط' as const,
src/App.tsx:    shiftStart: '08:00',
src/App.tsx:    shiftEnd: '18:00'
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const filteredEmployees = employees.filter(e => {
src/App.tsx:    const matchesDept = selectedDept === 'الكل' || e.department === selectedDept;
src/App.tsx:    const matchesSearch = e.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase());
src/App.tsx:    return matchesDept && matchesSearch;
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleAdd = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!formData.name) {
src/App.tsx:      alert('يرجى إدخال اسم الموظف');
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    if (formData.payMethod === 'daily' && formData.dailyRate <= 0) {
src/App.tsx:      alert('يرجى إدخال قيمة اليومية');
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    if (formData.payMethod === 'production' && (formData.pieceRate || 0) <= 0) {

src/App.tsx:      return;

src/App.tsx:      await addDoc(collection(db, 'employees'), formData);
src/App.tsx:      setShowAdd(false);
src/App.tsx:  };

src/App.tsx:      await updateDoc(doc(db, 'employees', id), data);

src/App.tsx:function HRWorkflowGuide({ activeTab, onTabChange }: { activeTab: string, onTabChange: (tab: string) => void }) {
src/App.tsx:  const steps = [
src/App.tsx:    { id: 'attendance', label: 'الحضور اليومي', icon: <CheckCircle2 size={16} />, desc: 'تسجيل الحضور والانصراف لكل موظف يومياً.' },

src/App.tsx:    { id: 'hrTransactions', label: 'تسوية الحسابات', icon: <DollarSign size={16} />, desc: 'إضافة المكافآت، الخصومات أو السلف الطارئة.' },
src/App.tsx:    { id: 'payroll', label: 'إقفال الرواتب', icon: <History size={16} />, desc: 'مراجعة الكشوف النهائية وصرف الرواتب للموظفين.' },
src/App.tsx:  ];
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const currentIndex = steps.findIndex(s => s.id === activeTab);
src/App.tsx:  if (currentIndex === -1 && activeTab !== 'employees' && activeTab !== 'loans') return null;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <div className="mb-10 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-[2rem] p-4 shadow-sm">
src/App.tsx:      <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row items-stretch gap-2">
src/App.tsx:        {steps.map((step, index) => {
src/App.tsx:          const isActive = activeTab === step.id;
src/App.tsx:          const isDone = currentIndex > index;
src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:              key={step.id}

src/App.tsx:                isActive ? 'bg-primary/5 border-2 border-primary/20 shadow-inner' : 'hover:bg-slate-50'
src/App.tsx:              }`}
src/App.tsx:            >

src/App.tsx:                  isActive ? 'bg-primary text-white scale-110 shadow-lg shadow-primary/30' : 
src/App.tsx:                  isDone ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-600' : 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-400'
src/App.tsx:                }`}>
src/App.tsx:                  {isDone ? <CheckCircle2 size={16} /> : step.icon}
src/App.tsx:                </div>

src/App.tsx:                  <h4 className={`text-sm font-black transition-all ${isActive ? 'text-primary' : 'text-slate-600'}`}>
src/App.tsx:                    {step.label}
src/App.tsx:                  </h4>
src/App.tsx:                  <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400">الخطوة {index + 1}</p>
src/App.tsx:                </div>
src/App.tsx:              </div>

src/App.tsx:                {step.desc}
src/App.tsx:              </p>
src/App.tsx:              
src/App.tsx:              {index < steps.length - 1 && (
src/App.tsx:                <div className="hidden md:block absolute -left-1 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 z-10">
src/App.tsx:                  <ChevronLeft className={`text-slate-200 ${isDone ? 'text-green-500' : ''}`} size={16} />
src/App.tsx:                </div>
src/App.tsx:              )}

src/App.tsx:function AttendanceView({ employees }: { employees: Employee[] }) {
src/App.tsx:  const [showAdd, setShowAdd] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:  const [editingAttendance, setEditingAttendance] = useState<Attendance | null>(null);
src/App.tsx:  const [deletingId, setDeletingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
src/App.tsx:  const [selectedDept, setSelectedDept] = useState<string>('الكل');
src/App.tsx:  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
src/App.tsx:    employeeId: '',
src/App.tsx:    checkIn: '08:00',
src/App.tsx:    checkOut: '18:00',
src/App.tsx:    status: 'حضور' as const
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Pagination Engine for History
src/App.tsx:  const [attendanceHistory, setAttendanceHistory] = useState<Attendance[]>([]);
src/App.tsx:  const [lastVisible, setLastVisible] = useState<any>(null);
src/App.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:  const [hasMore, setHasMore] = useState(true);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Today's attendance specific state
src/App.tsx:  const [todayAttendance, setTodayAttendance] = useState<Attendance[]>([]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Fetch today's attendance accurately without pagination
src/App.tsx:  const fetchTodayAttendance = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const snap = await getDocs(q);
src/App.tsx:      setTodayAttendance(snap.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as Attendance)));
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const fetchAttendanceHistory = async (isInitial = false) => {
src/App.tsx:    if (loading) return;
src/App.tsx:    if (!isInitial && !hasMore) return;
src/App.tsx:    setLoading(true);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      let q = query(
src/App.tsx:        collection(db, 'attendance'), 
src/App.tsx:        orderBy('date', 'desc'),
src/App.tsx:        limit(50)
src/App.tsx:      );
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      if (!isInitial && lastVisible) {
src/App.tsx:        q = query(q, startAfter(lastVisible));
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const snap = await getDocs(q);
src/App.tsx:      const newDocs = snap.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as Attendance));
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      if (snap.docs.length < 50) setHasMore(false);
src/App.tsx:      setLastVisible(snap.docs[snap.docs.length - 1]);
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      if (isInitial) {
src/App.tsx:        setAttendanceHistory(newDocs);
src/App.tsx:      } else {
src/App.tsx:        setAttendanceHistory(prev => [...prev, ...newDocs]);
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    } catch (err) {
src/App.tsx:    } finally {
src/App.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  React.useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    fetchTodayAttendance();
src/App.tsx:    fetchAttendanceHistory(true);
src/App.tsx:  }, []);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const employeeStatus = employees.map(emp => {
src/App.tsx:    const att = todayAttendance.find(a => a.employeeId === emp.id);
src/App.tsx:    return { ...emp, attendance: att };
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const missingAttendance = employeeStatus.filter(e => !e.attendance);
src/App.tsx:  const presentCount = employeeStatus.filter(e => e.attendance?.status === 'حضور' || e.attendance?.status === 'تأخير').length;
src/App.tsx:  const absentCount = employeeStatus.filter(e => e.attendance?.status === 'غياب').length;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const quickMarkAllPresent = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    const batch = writeBatch(db);
src/App.tsx:    missingAttendance.forEach(emp => {
src/App.tsx:      const newRef = doc(collection(db, 'attendance'));
src/App.tsx:      batch.set(newRef, {
src/App.tsx:        employeeId: emp.id,
src/App.tsx:        checkIn: '08:00',
src/App.tsx:        checkOut: '18:00',
src/App.tsx:        status: 'حضور'
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:    await batch.commit();
src/App.tsx:    // Refresh today's attendance
src/App.tsx:    fetchTodayAttendance();
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleAdd = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!formData.employeeId || !formData.date) return;
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      let finalStatus = formData.status;
src/App.tsx:      if (formData.status === 'حضور' || formData.status === 'تأخير') {
src/App.tsx:        const [hours, minutes] = formData.checkIn.split(':').map(Number);
src/App.tsx:        const checkInTime = hours * 60 + minutes;
src/App.tsx:        const officialTime = 8 * 60; // 08:00
src/App.tsx:        const gracePeriod = 15;
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        if (checkInTime > officialTime + gracePeriod) {
src/App.tsx:          finalStatus = 'تأخير';
src/App.tsx:        } else {
src/App.tsx:          finalStatus = 'حضور';
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const newRef = await addDoc(collection(db, 'attendance'), {
src/App.tsx:        ...formData,
src/App.tsx:        status: finalStatus
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      setShowAdd(false);
src/App.tsx:      setFormData({
src/App.tsx:        employeeId: '',
src/App.tsx:        checkIn: '08:00',
src/App.tsx:        checkOut: '18:00',
src/App.tsx:        status: 'حضور'
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      fetchAttendanceHistory(true);
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleUpdate = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!editingAttendance) return;
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      let finalStatus = editingAttendance.status;
src/App.tsx:      if (editingAttendance.status === 'حضور' || editingAttendance.status === 'تأخير') {
src/App.tsx:        const [hours, minutes] = editingAttendance.checkIn.split(':').map(Number);
src/App.tsx:        const checkInTime = hours * 60 + minutes;
src/App.tsx:        const officialTime = 8 * 60;
src/App.tsx:        const gracePeriod = 15;
src/App.tsx:        finalStatus = checkInTime > officialTime + gracePeriod ? 'تأخير' : 'حضور';
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      const { id, ...data } = editingAttendance;
src/App.tsx:      await updateDoc(doc(db, 'attendance', id), { ...data, status: finalStatus });
src/App.tsx:      setEditingAttendance(null);
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      // Update local history directly to avoid full refetch
src/App.tsx:      setAttendanceHistory(prev => prev.map(a => a.id === id ? { ...editingAttendance, status: finalStatus } as Attendance : a));
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleDelete = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!deletingId) return;
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const att = attendanceHistory.find(a => a.id === deletingId) || todayAttendance.find(a => a.id === deletingId);
src/App.tsx:      await deleteDoc(doc(db, 'attendance', deletingId));
src/App.tsx:      setDeletingId(null);

src/App.tsx:      setAttendanceHistory(prev => prev.filter(a => a.id !== deletingId));
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const filteredHistory = selectedDept === 'الكل'

src/App.tsx:        const emp = employees.find(e => e.id === att.employeeId);
src/App.tsx:        return emp?.department === selectedDept;
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const filteredEmployeeStatus = selectedDept === 'الكل' ? employeeStatus : employeeStatus.filter(e => e.department === selectedDept);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <div className="space-y-8">
src/App.tsx:      <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-6">
src/App.tsx:        <div>
src/App.tsx:          <h2 className="text-2xl md:text-4xl font-black tracking-tight text-slate-900">الحضور والانصراف</h2>

src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
src/App.tsx:          <select 
src/App.tsx:            className="h-10 md:h-12 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 px-4 bg-white font-bold text-sm"
src/App.tsx:            value={selectedDept}
src/App.tsx:            onChange={(e) => setSelectedDept(e.target.value)}

src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:function LoansView({ employees }: { employees: Employee[] }) {
src/App.tsx:  const [showAdd, setShowAdd] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:  const [editingLoan, setEditingLoan] = useState<Loan | null>(null);
src/App.tsx:  const [showDeleteConfirm, setShowDeleteConfirm] = useState<string | null>(null);
src/App.tsx:  const [selectedDept, setSelectedDept] = useState<string>('الكل');
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  // Pagination State
src/App.tsx:  const [loans, setLoans] = useState<Loan[]>([]);
src/App.tsx:  const [lastVisible, setLastVisible] = useState<any>(null);
src/App.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:  const [hasMore, setHasMore] = useState(true);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
src/App.tsx:    employeeId: '',
src/App.tsx:    amount: 0,
src/App.tsx:    installments: 0,
src/App.tsx:    paidAlready: 0,
src/App.tsx:    notes: '',
src/App.tsx:    status: 'نشط' as const
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const fetchLoans = async (isInitial = false) => {
src/App.tsx:    if (loading) return;
src/App.tsx:    if (!isInitial && !hasMore) return;
src/App.tsx:    setLoading(true);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      let q = query(
src/App.tsx:        collection(db, 'loans'), 
src/App.tsx:        orderBy('date', 'desc'),
src/App.tsx:        limit(50)
src/App.tsx:      );
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      if (!isInitial && lastVisible) {
src/App.tsx:        q = query(q, startAfter(lastVisible));
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const snap = await getDocs(q);
src/App.tsx:      const newDocs = snap.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as Loan));
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      if (snap.docs.length < 50) setHasMore(false);
src/App.tsx:      setLastVisible(snap.docs[snap.docs.length - 1]);
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      if (isInitial) {
src/App.tsx:        setLoans(newDocs);
src/App.tsx:      } else {
src/App.tsx:        setLoans(prev => [...prev, ...newDocs]);
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    } catch (err) {
src/App.tsx:    } finally {
src/App.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  React.useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    fetchLoans(true);
src/App.tsx:  }, []);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleAdd = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!formData.employeeId || formData.amount <= 0) return;
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const remainingAmount = formData.amount - formData.paidAlready;
src/App.tsx:      await addDoc(collection(db, 'loans'), {
src/App.tsx:        ...formData,
src/App.tsx:        remainingAmount: remainingAmount > 0 ? remainingAmount : 0,
src/App.tsx:        status: remainingAmount <= 0 ? 'مسدد' : 'نشط'
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:      setShowAdd(false);
src/App.tsx:      setFormData({
src/App.tsx:        employeeId: '',
src/App.tsx:        amount: 0,
src/App.tsx:        installments: 0,
src/App.tsx:        paidAlready: 0,
src/App.tsx:        notes: '',
src/App.tsx:        status: 'نشط'
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:      fetchLoans(true);
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      await deleteDoc(doc(db, 'loans', id));
src/App.tsx:      setShowDeleteConfirm(null);
src/App.tsx:      setLoans(prev => prev.filter(l => l.id !== id));
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleUpdate = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!editingLoan) return;
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const remainingAmount = editingLoan.amount - (editingLoan.paidAlready || 0);
src/App.tsx:      const { id, ...data } = editingLoan;
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const updatedData = {
src/App.tsx:        ...data,
src/App.tsx:        remainingAmount: remainingAmount > 0 ? remainingAmount : 0,
src/App.tsx:        status: remainingAmount <= 0 ? 'مسدد' : 'نشط'
src/App.tsx:      };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      await updateDoc(doc(db, 'loans', id), updatedData);
src/App.tsx:      setEditingLoan(null);
src/App.tsx:      setLoans(prev => prev.map(l => l.id === id ? { ...l, ...updatedData, id } as Loan : l));
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const filteredLoans = selectedDept === 'الكل'
src/App.tsx:    ? loans
src/App.tsx:    : loans.filter(loan => {
src/App.tsx:        const emp = employees.find(e => e.id === loan.employeeId);
src/App.tsx:        return emp?.department === selectedDept;
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const totalActiveLoans = loans.filter(l => l.status === 'نشط').reduce((acc, l) => acc + l.amount, 0);
src/App.tsx:  const totalRemaining = loans.filter(l => l.status === 'نشط').reduce((acc, l) => acc + l.remainingAmount, 0);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <div className="space-y-8">
src/App.tsx:      <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-6">
src/App.tsx:        <div>
src/App.tsx:          <h2 className="text-2xl md:text-4xl font-black tracking-tight text-slate-900">سجل السلف</h2>
src/App.tsx:          <p className="text-slate-500 mt-1 font-medium text-sm md:text-base">إدارة ومتابعة سلف الموظفين</p>
src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
src/App.tsx:          <select 
src/App.tsx:            className="h-10 md:h-12 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 px-4 bg-white font-bold text-sm"
src/App.tsx:            value={selectedDept}
src/App.tsx:            onChange={(e) => setSelectedDept(e.target.value)}
src/App.tsx:          >
src/App.tsx:            {departments.map(dept => (
src/App.tsx:              <option key={dept} value={dept}>{dept}</option>
src/App.tsx:            ))}
src/App.tsx:          </select>

src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:function HRTransactionsView({ employees, transactions }: { employees: Employee[], transactions: FinancialTransaction[] }) {
src/App.tsx:  const [showAdd, setShowAdd] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:  const [editingTransaction, setEditingTransaction] = useState<FinancialTransaction | null>(null);
src/App.tsx:  const [deletingId, setDeletingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
src/App.tsx:  const [selectedDept, setSelectedDept] = useState<string>('الكل');
src/App.tsx:  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
src/App.tsx:    employeeId: '',
src/App.tsx:    type: 'مكافأة' as const,
src/App.tsx:    amount: 0,
src/App.tsx:    description: '',
src/App.tsx:    overtimeHours: 0,
src/App.tsx:    overtimeRate: 1.5 as 1.33 | 1.5 | 2
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleAdd = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!formData.employeeId) return;
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    let finalData = { ...formData };
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    // If it's overtime, calculate the amount automatically
src/App.tsx:    if (formData.type === 'إضافي') {
src/App.tsx:      const emp = employees.find(e => e.id === formData.employeeId);
src/App.tsx:      if (emp && formData.overtimeHours > 0) {
src/App.tsx:        const hourlyRate = emp.dailyRate / 10;
src/App.tsx:        finalData.amount = formData.overtimeHours * formData.overtimeRate * hourlyRate;
src/App.tsx:        if (!finalData.description) {
src/App.tsx:          finalData.description = `إضافي ${formData.overtimeHours} ساعة بمعدل ${formData.overtimeRate}`;
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    if (finalData.amount <= 0 && finalData.type !== 'إضافي') return;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      await addDoc(collection(db, 'hrTransactions'), finalData);
src/App.tsx:      setShowAdd(false);
src/App.tsx:      setFormData({
src/App.tsx:        employeeId: '',
src/App.tsx:        type: 'مكافأة',
src/App.tsx:        amount: 0,
src/App.tsx:        description: '',
src/App.tsx:        overtimeHours: 0,
src/App.tsx:        overtimeRate: 1.5
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleUpdate = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!editingTransaction) return;
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    let finalData = { ...editingTransaction };
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    if (finalData.type === 'إضافي') {
src/App.tsx:      const emp = employees.find(e => e.id === finalData.employeeId);
src/App.tsx:      if (emp && finalData.overtimeHours && finalData.overtimeHours > 0) {
src/App.tsx:        const hourlyRate = emp.dailyRate / 10;
src/App.tsx:        finalData.amount = finalData.overtimeHours * (finalData.overtimeRate || 1.5) * hourlyRate;
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    if (finalData.amount <= 0 && finalData.type !== 'إضافي') return;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const { id, ...data } = finalData;
src/App.tsx:      await updateDoc(doc(db, 'hrTransactions', id), data);
src/App.tsx:      setEditingTransaction(null);
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleDelete = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!deletingId) return;
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      await deleteDoc(doc(db, 'hrTransactions', deletingId));
src/App.tsx:      setDeletingId(null);
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const filteredTransactions = selectedDept === 'الكل'
src/App.tsx:    ? transactions
src/App.tsx:    : transactions.filter(tr => {
src/App.tsx:        const emp = employees.find(e => e.id === tr.employeeId);
src/App.tsx:        return emp?.department === selectedDept;
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <div className="space-y-8">
src/App.tsx:      <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-6">
src/App.tsx:        <div>
src/App.tsx:          <h2 className="text-2xl md:text-4xl font-black tracking-tight text-slate-900">الحركات المالية</h2>
src/App.tsx:          <p className="text-slate-500 mt-1 font-medium text-sm md:text-base">تسجيل المكافآت والخصومات والبدلات والوقت الإضافي</p>
src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
src/App.tsx:          <select 
src/App.tsx:            className="h-10 md:h-12 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 px-4 bg-white font-bold text-sm"
src/App.tsx:            value={selectedDept}
src/App.tsx:            onChange={(e) => setSelectedDept(e.target.value)}
src/App.tsx:          >
src/App.tsx:            {departments.map(dept => (
src/App.tsx:              <option key={dept} value={dept}>{dept}</option>
src/App.tsx:            ))}
src/App.tsx:          </select>
src/App.tsx:          <Button onClick={() => setShowAdd(true)} className="btn-primary h-10 md:h-12 px-6 md:px-8">
src/App.tsx:            <Plus size={18} className="ml-2" />
src/App.tsx:            إضافة حركة جديدة
src/App.tsx:          </Button>
src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:      </div>
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      <Card className="dribbble-card overflow-hidden border-none">
src/App.tsx:        <div className="overflow-x-auto w-full">
src/App.tsx:          <Table>
src/App.tsx:          <TableHeader className="bg-slate-50/50">
src/App.tsx:            <TableRow>
src/App.tsx:              <TableHead className="text-right font-black text-slate-900 py-5">التاريخ</TableHead>
src/App.tsx:              <TableHead className="text-right font-black text-slate-900">الموظف</TableHead>
src/App.tsx:              <TableHead className="text-right font-black text-slate-900">النوع</TableHead>
src/App.tsx:              <TableHead className="text-right font-black text-slate-900">المبلغ</TableHead>
src/App.tsx:              <TableHead className="text-right font-black text-slate-900">الوصف</TableHead>
src/App.tsx:              <TableHead className="text-right font-black text-slate-900">الإجراءات</TableHead>
src/App.tsx:            </TableRow>
src/App.tsx:          </TableHeader>

src/App.tsx:  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const productionEmployees = employees.filter(e => e.payMethod === 'production');
src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:      return false;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    return true;

src/App.tsx:    setItems([...items, { id: Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9), itemName: '', quantity: 0, rate: 0 }]);

src/App.tsx:  const removeItem = (id: string) => {

src/App.tsx:      setItems(items.filter(item => item.id !== id));
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };

src/App.tsx:  const updateItem = (id: string, field: string, value: any) => {

src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }

src/App.tsx:  const applyLoanDeductionsToBatch = (payroll: Payroll, batch: any) => {
src/App.tsx:    if (payroll.totalLoans <= 0) return;
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    const empLoans = loans.filter(l => l.employeeId === payroll.employeeId && l.status === 'نشط');
src/App.tsx:    let remainingDeduction = payroll.totalLoans;
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    for (const loan of empLoans) {
src/App.tsx:      if (remainingDeduction <= 0) break;
src/App.tsx:      const deduction = Math.min(loan.remainingAmount, remainingDeduction);
src/App.tsx:      const newRemaining = loan.remainingAmount - deduction;
src/App.tsx:      const newPaidAlready = (loan.paidAlready || 0) + deduction;
src/App.tsx:      batch.update(doc(db, 'loans', loan.id), {
src/App.tsx:        remainingAmount: newRemaining,
src/App.tsx:        paidAlready: newPaidAlready,
src/App.tsx:        status: newRemaining <= 0 ? 'مسدد' : 'نشط'
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:      remainingDeduction -= deduction;
src/App.tsx:    }

src/App.tsx:function ArchiveView({ employees, payrolls, transactions }: { employees: Employee[], payrolls: Payroll[], transactions: FinancialTransaction[] }) {
src/App.tsx:  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
src/App.tsx:  const [selectedPayroll, setSelectedPayroll] = useState<Payroll | null>(null);
src/App.tsx:  const [editingPayroll, setEditingPayroll] = useState<Payroll | null>(null);
src/App.tsx:  const [deletingId, setDeletingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
src/App.tsx:  const [selectedDept, setSelectedDept] = useState<string>('الكل');
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  const archivedPayrolls = payrolls.filter(p => p.status === 'مدفوع');
src/App.tsx:  const totalArchived = archivedPayrolls.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.netSalary, 0);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  const filtered = archivedPayrolls.filter(p => {
src/App.tsx:    const emp = employees.find(e => e.id === p.employeeId);
src/App.tsx:    const matchesSearch = emp?.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase());
src/App.tsx:    const matchesDept = selectedDept === 'الكل' || emp?.department === selectedDept;
src/App.tsx:    return matchesSearch && matchesDept;
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleUpdatePayroll = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!editingPayroll) return;
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const { id, ...data } = editingPayroll;
src/App.tsx:      // Recalculate net salary for archived entries
src/App.tsx:      const netSalary = (data.baseSalary || 0) + (data.totalBonuses || 0) + (data.totalOvertime || 0) - (data.totalDeductions || 0) - (data.totalExpenses || 0) - (data.totalLoans || 0);
src/App.tsx:      await updateDoc(doc(db, 'payrolls', id), { ...data, netSalary });
src/App.tsx:      setEditingPayroll(null);
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleDeletePayroll = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!deletingId) return;
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      await deleteDoc(doc(db, 'payrolls', deletingId));
src/App.tsx:      setDeletingId(null);
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleExportExcel = () => {
src/App.tsx:    const dataToExport = filtered.map(p => ({

src/App.tsx:      'اسم الموظف': employees.find(e => e.id === p.employeeId)?.name || 'غير معروف',
src/App.tsx:      'اليومية': p.dailyRate,
src/App.tsx:      'أيام العمل': p.daysWorked,
src/App.tsx:      'إجمالي اليوميات': p.baseSalary,
src/App.tsx:      'إضافي': p.totalOvertime,
src/App.tsx:      'مكافآت': p.totalBonuses,
src/App.tsx:      'خصومات': p.totalDeductions,
src/App.tsx:      'مصروفات': p.totalExpenses || 0,
src/App.tsx:      'سلف': p.totalLoans,
src/App.tsx:      'صافي الراتب': p.netSalary,
src/App.tsx:      'الحالة': p.status
src/App.tsx:    }));
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const ws = XLSX.utils.json_to_sheet(dataToExport);
src/App.tsx:    const wb = XLSX.utils.book_new();
src/App.tsx:    XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb, ws, "Archived_Payroll");
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (

src/App.tsx:            <DollarSign className="text-green-600" size={24} />
src/App.tsx:          </div>

src/App.tsx:            value={searchTerm}

src/App.tsx:    const newItem: RecipeItem = {
src/App.tsx:      id: Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9),
src/App.tsx:      name: '',
src/App.tsx:      quantity: 1,
src/App.tsx:      unit: 'قطعة',
src/App.tsx:      unitPrice: 0,
src/App.tsx:      total: 0
src/App.tsx:    };

src/App.tsx:    setRecipeForm({ ...recipeForm, departments: newDepts });
src/App.tsx:  };

src/App.tsx:  const handleUpdateItem = (deptIdx: number, itemIdx: number, updates: Partial<RecipeItem>) => {
src/App.tsx:    const newDepts = [...(recipeForm.departments || [])];
src/App.tsx:    const item = { ...newDepts[deptIdx].items[itemIdx], ...updates };
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    // Auto-fill from stockItems if name matches exactly and price/unit not provided in updates
src/App.tsx:    if (updates.name && !updates.unit && !updates.unitPrice) {
src/App.tsx:      const stockItem = stockItems.find(si => si.name === updates.name);
src/App.tsx:      if (stockItem) {
src/App.tsx:        item.unit = stockItem.unit;
src/App.tsx:        item.unitPrice = stockItem.price;
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    item.total = item.quantity * item.unitPrice;
src/App.tsx:    newDepts[deptIdx].items[itemIdx] = item;
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    // Recalculate department total
src/App.tsx:    newDepts[deptIdx].totalCost = newDepts[deptIdx].items.reduce((sum, it) => sum + it.total, 0);
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    setRecipeForm({ ...recipeForm, departments: newDepts });
src/App.tsx:  };
